page_content:
Admission to the Major

Students who are accepted to the university and list Information Science (InfoSci) as their preferred major will start directly in our program. Students currently in the university who are interested in declaring Information Science must complete our Change of Major process (https://ischool.umd.edu/academics/bachelors-programs/change- major/). For more information please visit the InfoSci website (https:// ischool.umd.edu/academics/bachelors-programs/bachelor-of-science-in- information-science-college-park/) or email infougadvising@umd.edu.
